creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Bernard Spil from comment #0)

patch says that the patch is malformed:

Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff --git a/security/liboqs/Makefile b/security/liboqs/Makefile
|index b867d1dd49..3abb4d6320 100644
|--- a/security/liboqs/Makefile
|+++ b/security/liboqs/Makefile
--------------------------
Patching file security/liboqs/Makefile using Plan A...
patch: **** malformed patch at line 10:
